summary: Wired provider L0 summary invariant validation into CLI dry-run JSON summary paths. ask_provider.py and compare_providers.py now support --validate-l0-invariants for --print-context-summary --summary-format json, adding an additive validation.l0_invariants object with ok/errors. They also support --fail-on-invalid-l0 to return non-zero when validation fails. Without --validate-l0-invariants, default JSON output is unchanged. The feature reuses validate_provider_l0_invariants, remains read-only, and does not change prompt assembly, context packs, L0 creation/loading, or provider calls. Full suite passed with 242 tests.
